title: Aggregate Functions
description: Fungsi aggregate untuk menghitung statistik dari sekumpulan data.

commands.name: COUNT / SUM / AVG
commands.title: Count, Sum, Average
commands.description: Fungsi aggregate dasar untuk menghitung jumlah, total, dan rata-rata.
commands.notes: AVG mengabaikan NULL. Gunakan COALESCE jika ingin menganggap NULL sebagai 0.

commands.name: MIN / MAX
commands.title: Minimum dan Maximum
commands.examples:
SELECT MIN(price), MAX(price) FROM products;
SELECT MIN(created_at), MAX(created_at) FROM orders;
commands.notes: Bekerja pada angka, string, dan tanggal.

commands.name: STRING_AGG
commands.title: Menggabungkan String dalam Group
commands.description: Menggabungkan nilai string dari beberapa baris menjadi satu string.

commands.name: ARRAY_AGG / JSON_AGG
commands.title: Aggregate ke Array atau JSON
commands.description: Mengumpulkan nilai ke dalam array atau JSON array.
commands.notes: ARRAY_AGG dan JSON_AGG sangat berguna untuk denormalisasi data.

commands.name: BOOL_AND / BOOL_OR
commands.title: Aggregate Boolean
commands.description: Aggregate logika AND dan OR pada kolom boolean.
commands.examples:
SELECT department, BOOL_AND(active) AS all_active, BOOL_OR(is_manager) AS has_manager
FROM employees GROUP BY department;
commands.notes: BOOL_AND = true jika semua true. BOOL_OR = true jika salah satu true.

commands.name: FILTER
commands.title: Conditional Aggregate (FILTER)
commands.description: Menerapkan filter pada aggregate function tanpa subquery.
commands.examples:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed') AS completed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'pending') AS pending,
  SUM(total) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed') AS completed_revenue
FROM orders;
commands.notes: FILTER lebih bersih dan efisien dari CASE WHEN dalam aggregate. Fitur unik PostgreSQL.
